strengths: Direct primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, and React used in production across multiple senior roles
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at current role
15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering with consistent seniority progression and cloud/containerization experience
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere — core framework in the required stack may require onboarding time
Vitest and Jest not explicitly cited despite testing frameworks being a required skill area
Kotlin/Java exposure is absent or minimal despite being listed as a secondary stack requirement
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for this role with deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience directly matching the primary stack, and his current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. His 15+ years of senior-level, polyglot full-stack work — spanning enterprise products, high-throughput microservices, GIS platforms, and internal tooling — demonstrates the architecture and scalability judgment the role demands. The main gap is the absence of explicit NestJS and Vitest experience, though his consistent TDD background, testing workshops, and framework breadth strongly suggest these would be bridged quickly. Kotlin/Java exposure is thin but secondary to the role. Overall a high-confidence hire.
